content: (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Frea, Lydia, Imperial Soldier, chicken, Cow) (The location is now Sarethi Farm.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): chicken, chicken, Goat, Old Orc, Stormcloak Soldier)
Serana: You know, this clear sky at Sarethi Farm makes me miss the old Volkihar nights—endless stars perfect for stargazing orgies, not chasing chickens and goats like some barnyard bloodwine binge.

(*You are observing the following:* In this nighttime outdoor scene, a vast starry sky dominates the view, filled with countless twinkling stars and a prominent, glowing band of the Milky Way stretching across the darkness. The horizon is framed by a dense cluster of autumnal trees, their branches heavy with vibrant yellow and orange foliage that sways gently, casting subtle shadows on the uneven, grassy hillside below. Scattered rocks and small bushes dot the foreground terrain, blending into patches of lush green grass and wildflowers. The overall atmosphere is serene and immersive, with the cool blue-black of the night contrasting against the warm earthy tones of the landscape. At the lower edge of the view, a semi-transparent interface overlays the scene, featuring various small icons and panels: a circular clock displaying the time, notification symbols, a network status indicator, a battery gauge, and several application windows or tools, including what appears to be a volume control, a search bar, and minimized program icons arranged along a toolbar. A subtle red cursor or highlight hovers near one of the edges, suggesting interactive elements within this virtual space.)
